mission: Finish the reliability path for RUTA_RUTERO and Control Gestion, prove the engineering system in real work, perform a controlled Supabase transition, and unlock the next product-development phase without adding unnecessary platform complexity.
operating_principles: Be effective, simple, methodological and evidence-driven.
Maintain at most two active lanes: one operational lane and one platform or product lane.
Use the largest coherent scope that remains auditable, reversible and isolated.
A backlog item is not authorization.
No production write, DDL, cleanup or retention action occurs without an explicit phase and rollback contract.
Do not create additional skills, hooks, MCP servers, subagents or governance layers until the existing tooling is used in real work and its benefit is measured.
Close findings and update shared state in the same execution cycle when materially necessary; avoid separate memory-only phases unless evidence changes authority or gates.
After one implementation and one independent validation, proceed if there are no BLOCKER or HIGH findings. Do not create review chains for documentary LOW findings.
The objective is product readiness, not permanent platform construction.

completed: Primary checkout protected from pilot writes
Local environment setup safe in dry-run
Observation ledger remains empty and unchanged
First real use of sz-load-observation completed in CG005I-M local lab
Platform expansion frozen after first real use

direction: Control Gestion becomes the predominant operational domain.
Inventory becomes a smaller, isolated read capability.
Shared route data becomes a reusable service surface.
The app evolves toward a Decision Tower with alerts, actions, owners and outcomes.

lane_2.name: PLATFORM_THEN_PRODUCT
lane_2.transition_rule: After the platform branch is merged and used once, freeze platform expansion and replace this lane with PRODUCT_V2.

execution_queue.name: Independent branch review
execution_queue.objective: Independently review the complete platform branch, worktree tooling and load-observation skill without merge or writes.
entry_criteria: Platform branch head is 6a965ec or a documented successor.
Main contains CG005F closure and shared-memory absorption.
exit_criteria: No BLOCKER or HIGH security/semantic findings, or a bounded correction list exists.
Main divergence and overlap are classified.
Unique tests, skips and documentary drift are reported.
Verdict is READY_FOR_MERGE_PREPARATION or a single bounded correction is specified.
execution_queue.stop_rule: No second broad review if there are no BLOCKER or HIGH findings.

execution_queue.name: Controlled rebase, retest and merge preparation
execution_queue.objective: Rebase the platform branch onto current origin/main, repeat all relevant tests, verify ledger integrity and prepare a controlled merge.
entry_criteria: Claude branch review accepted or bounded corrections completed.
required_checks: Rebase without force or hidden conflict resolution.
No RUTA_RUTERO, SQL or operational files enter the merge unexpectedly.
Diff against main is reviewed by file and commit.
exit_criteria: Branch is clean and current with main.
Tests pass after rebase.
Merge scope is exact.
Bastian and ChatGPT authorize merge.

execution_queue.name: First real use and value measurement
execution_queue.objective: Use the integrated worktree process and sz-load-observation once on safe completed load evidence, then measure whether the tooling reduces effort and risk.
entry_criteria: A completed safe phase JSON exists.
No secrets, PII, payloads or row collections are required.
exit_criteria: One UNREVIEWED candidate is generated and validated.
The skill does not write the ledger.
Manual steps removed and time spent are recorded.
A separate authorized phase decides whether to append the observation.
Platform expansion is frozen after this first use.

execution_queue.name: Correct F-08 advisory lock and F-04 rollback postcheck
execution_queue.objective: Correct only the two remaining route-replacement findings in an isolated write worktree without DB, DDL or apply.

F-08: Use one deterministic bigint advisory-lock key for contract, source and effective week.
Keep apply and rollback on the same lock-key algorithm.
Add tests for deterministic key construction and SQL signature shape.
F-04: Before rollback commit, compare restored current-surface hash to the previous assignment.
Validate active and rolled-back assignment states.
Validate missing and extra logical grains equal zero.
Abort the transaction on any mismatch.

exit_criteria: Only F-04/F-08-related files changed.
No DB, DDL, apply or rollback executed.
Targeted and existing tests pass.
Branch is ready for targeted Claude validation.

execution_queue.name: Targeted independent revalidation
execution_queue.objective: Validate only advisory-lock correctness and full rollback postchecks; do not reopen the nine closed findings.
exit_criteria: F-04 is CORRECTED.
F-08 is CORRECTED.
No new BLOCKER or HIGH finding exists.
Local PostgreSQL laboratory is explicitly authorized as the next phase.
execution_queue.stop_rule: If both findings are corrected and there are no BLOCKER/HIGH findings, end static review and proceed to the local lab.

execution_queue.name: Five-step behavioral local laboratory

subphases.name: Apply SQL 11 contract locally
subphases.proof: Schema, constraints, views and advisory-lock signature execute in local PostgreSQL only.

subphases.name: Load snapshot A
subphases.proof: First weekly assignment is active, hashes match and resolved grains are correct.

subphases.name: Replace with snapshot B for the same week
subphases.proof: A becomes SUPERSEDED, B becomes ACTIVE, removals do not reappear and no stale rows survive.

subphases.name: Rollback B to A
subphases.proof: All rollback postchecks pass before commit and A is restored exactly.

subphases.name: Clean-room rebuild
subphases.proof: Git, SQL, manifest and explicit parameters reproduce identical hashes and logical grains.

exit_criteria: All five subphases pass.
No unexplained key or value difference remains in the route surface.
Rollback is behaviorally proven.
Classification becomes LOCAL_LAB_VALIDATED.
Supabase remains unchanged.

execution_queue.name: Controlled Supabase transition

subphases.name: DDL contract apply
subphases.proof: DDL objects exist and read-only contract checks pass before data load.

subphases.name: Productive dry-run
subphases.proof: Exact file hash, week, changes, planned rows, assignments and rollback target match the approved plan.

subphases.name: Guarded apply
subphases.authorization: Explicit confirmation token, expected hash, week and mandatory postcheck
subphases.proof: Transaction commits only after all guards and postchecks pass.

subphases.name: Postvalidation
subphases.proof: History, current surface, assignment, resolved view, hashes and other weeks remain correct.

exit_criteria: Week 2026-06-08 route snapshot is explicitly assigned and postvalidated.
No stale or legacy-backfilled grain exists.
Rollback target is proven and available.
A safe phase JSON is available for the first load observation.

execution_queue.name: Measure impact on Control Gestion
execution_queue.objective: Explain how the authoritative route replacement changes daily and weekly compliance without accepting unexplained technical differences.
comparison_surfaces: Clients and stores added or removed
exit_criteria: Every material before/after difference has an evidence-backed class.
No duplicate logical grain exists.
No unintended impact on other weeks exists.
Business-facing summary is available.

execution_queue.name: Real-week canonical dual-run shadow
execution_queue.objective: Run the current materialized flow and the canonical C006/C007 builder in parallel without overwriting productive facts.
exit_criteria: No unexplained technical difference remains.
Business differences are accepted or rejected explicitly.
Canonical builder is approved or returned for one bounded correction.
CG-006 registry design may begin.

execution_queue.name: Persist explicit build lineage
exit_criteria: No productive build depends on implicit latest.
Every build can be reconstructed from explicit lineage.
CG-007 canary contract is ready.

execution_queue.name: Bounded production canary
execution_queue.objective: Apply the canonical build contract to one bounded week or date window with rollback and observability.
exit_criteria: Canary postchecks pass.
Rollback remains available.
Runtime is acceptable.
No unexplained business regression exists.
Supabase sanitation gates may open.

execution_queue.name: Evidence-based Supabase sanitation

levels.name: Catalog and lineage
actions: Inventory tables, views, materialized views, functions, indexes, constraints, RLS, sizes, producers and consumers.
Classify REQUIRED_CURRENT, REQUIRED_HISTORY, RECONSTRUCTIBLE, AUDIT_ONLY, ORPHAN_CANDIDATE and UNKNOWN.

levels.name: Optimization without deletion
actions: Fix missing indexes and expensive joins.
Prefer persisted daily/weekly surfaces over raw recomputation.

levels.name: Retention and archival
actions: Archive only evidence-backed reconstructible or unused batches.
Require manifest, counts, hashes, consumer analysis and rollback.

levels.name: Deprecation
actions: Retire legacy views/functions only after zero-consumer or replacement proof.
Keep payload_json until an alternative surface reaches parity.

exit_criteria: Storage growth is controlled.
No required current or historical surface is removed.
Runtime queries improve measurably.
DB-002 can close.

product_tracks.objective: Separate inventory, control_gestion, shared_route and decision_tower capabilities inside the same repository.
Reduce Inventory to an isolated latest-snapshot read capability without controlling the app architecture.
Make compliance, pending work, recurrence, owners, freshness and weekly comparison the main operational domain.
Add alert, priority, owner, action, due date, status and outcome tracking to direct the workforce.
Extract domain rules, builders, queries, services and exports so Streamlit becomes a presentation consumer rather than the business-logic container.

opens_when: Platform branch merged after independent review and retest.
Worktree process used successfully at least twice.
sz-load-observation used once without ledger write or privacy issue.
GATE_PLATFORM_PROVEN.effect: Freeze platform expansion and treat current tooling as operational infrastructure.

opens_when: F-04 and F-08 corrected and targeted-review approved.
GATE_ROUTE_APPLY_READY.effect: Allow a separately authorized Supabase DDL and dry-run sequence.

opens_when: Authoritative RUTA_RUTERO week is postvalidated in Supabase.
Impact on Control Gestion is fully classified with no UNEXPLAINED material difference.
Real canonical shadow is accepted or has one bounded correction plan.
Platform tooling is integrated and frozen.
GATE_PRODUCT_V2_READY.effect: ChatGPT declares STOCK_ZERO ready for new product implementations. Product V2 may start while canary and sanitation continue as the operational lane.

opens_when: Catalog and lineage classify every candidate object/batch.
Backup, manifest and rollback are defined.
GATE_SUPABASE_CLEANUP.effect: Allow retention, archival and deprecation phases; payload_json remains protected until replacement parity.

phase_closure_contract.state_update_rule: When a phase materially changes gates, update this roadmap, AI_SHARED_MEMORY and AI_BACKLOG in the same closure commit where practical. Do not create a separate absorption phase for non-material documentary changes.
phase_closure_contract.review_rule: One implementation review plus one independent review is the normal maximum. Continue only for BLOCKER/HIGH or directly reproducible material defects.

do_not_do_now: Do not create more skills, hooks, MCP servers, subagents or automated model selectors.
Do not refactor the whole Streamlit app before the product-readiness gate.
Do not clean Supabase before the canary and lineage catalog.
Do not remove payload_json without replacement parity.
Do not delete inherited dirty-main files as part of unrelated phases.
Do not rerun closed CG005A-F investigations except the targeted F-04/F-08 validation.
Do not use latest raw or latest route as an implicit temporal contract.
Do not let platform validation become the primary project.

immediate_next_actions.action: Obtain explicit Bastian authorization for CG005N DDL only.
Execute CG005N DDL and read-only postcheck.
Request separate authorization for CG005P apply.
Measure route impact on Control Gestion.

definition_of_done.route_path: RUTA_RUTERO weekly replacement, second replacement and rollback are proven locally and one authorized Supabase week is postvalidated.
definition_of_done.control_gestion_path: Route impact is explained and the canonical real-week shadow has no unexplained technical difference.
definition_of_done.platform_path: Worktrees and load-observation tooling are merged, used and frozen from further expansion.
definition_of_done.supabase_path: Build registry and canary are active before cleanup; sanitation is evidence-based and reversible.
definition_of_done.product_path: ChatGPT and Bastian open GATE_PRODUCT_V2_READY and begin Control Gestion core, reduced Inventory and Decision Tower implementation.

note: This roadmap is the active sequencing and readiness contract. Individual phases still require explicit authorization.
